country_result:
Country: Canada
Coordinates: 51.5000, -106.0000
Reasoning: The landscape is characteristic of the Canadian Prairies, featuring vast, flat agricultural fields and deciduous shelterbelts. While the infrastructure is similar to the US Midwest, the combination of Gen 3 camera quality, the specific road-to-shoulder transition (narrow asphalt with wide gravel shoulders), and the presence of white raised pavement markers on the shoulder lines strongly points toward rural Saskatchewan or Alberta.
